description: Golden corpus of canonical wire payloads for Contract v1. Every fixture is one example payload that all four implementations of the wire (Workshop HTTP server, raindrop-js zod schemas, Python pydantic mirrors, Rust serde mirrors) must agree on. Drift in any single implementation surfaces as a fixture-test failure in that language.

notes.track-partial/with-trace-id-only: Documents Workshop's trace-only-attach case. /v1/events/track_partial accepts a body with no event_id when properties.trace_id is present (the run is keyed by trace_id directly). The current TrackPartialEventSchema in raindrop-js requires event_id; once Workshop adopts that schema (Phase B), either the fixture or the schema must be reconciled.
notes.replay/*: These fixtures describe wire shapes between Workshop and a user-repo replay adapter. adapter-request, adapter-response, and health-response do NOT have a Workshop-side endpoint to POST to (they are consumed by the user's /replay and /health). register-request targets POST /api/replay/adapters/register, which is not yet implemented in Workshop; the test validates the fixture parses as JSON without asserting an HTTP response.
